name: Incus CLI + bidirectional import/export
description: Installs the Incus client (incus CLI) and helper scripts for bidirectional image import/export between the devcontainer and a remote Incus server. Supports pushing local distrobuilder images into Incus and pulling Incus images out as OCI tarballs.

version.description: Incus client version to install ('latest' uses the current stable from zabbly/incus).

remote.description: Default Incus remote name to configure (e.g. 'my-server'). Leave blank to skip remote setup.

remote_url.description: URL of the default Incus remote (e.g. 'https://incus.example.com:8443'). Required if 'remote' is set.
